title: A Song for Emma
content: David loved playing the guitar, but he rarely performed in front of other people. When Emma's birthday arrived, he decided to write a simple song just for her. At the small party, he stood in front of everyone with shaking hands and began to play. The melody was soft, and the lyrics spoke about friendship, kindness, and hope for the future. Emma smiled from the first note to the last. When the song ended, she hugged David tightly. It became the most unforgettable birthday gift she had ever received.
